title: Lead AI ML Engineer
company_focus:
Product development partner building software products for
SaaS, media, and retail industries
description:
We build breakthrough software products that power digital
businesses. We are an innovative product development partner
whose solutions drive rapid revenue, market share, and
customer growth for industry leaders in Software and SaaS,
Media and Publishing, Information Services, and Retail. Our
key differentiator is our Product Mindset. Our development
teams focus on building for outcomes and all of our team
members around the globe are trained on the Product
Mindset’s core values – Minimize Time to Value, Solve For
Need, and Excel at Change. Our teams apply this mindset to
build digital products that are customer-facing and revenue-
generating. Our business-minded approach to agile
development ensures that we align to client goals from the
earliest conceptual stages through market launch and beyond.

In 2024, 3Pillar Global India was named as a “Great Place to
Work” for the fifth year in a row based on how our employees
feel about our company, collaborative culture, and work/life
balance - come join our growing team

Minumum Qualification

- 8+ years of experience building and deploying AI/ML models
  (ML, NLP, deep learning).
- Proven experience delivering ML solutions from concept to
  production.
- Strong leadership and ability to communicate technical
  concepts to non-technical stakeholders.
- Proficient in Python with experience using PyTorch,
  TensorFlow, Scikit-learn.
- Hands-on experience with data preparation, feature
  engineering, model training, and tuning (Pandas, Spark).
- Experience with NLP, computer vision, LLMs (APIs or fine-
  tuning), Agentic AI, and MCP-based architectures.
- Familiarity with cloud platforms (AWS, Azure, or GCP) and
  MLOps/CI/CD tools (MLflow, GitHub Actions).
- Knowledge of vector embeddings, vector stores, RAG, and LLM
  frameworks (LangChain, LlamaIndex).
- Experience with model monitoring and performance tracking
  tools.

Additional Desired Experience

- Led teams building GenAI, LLM, Agentic AI, or MCP-driven
  applications.
- Experience with vector databases (FAISS, Pinecone) and
  Hugging Face ecosystem.
- Built reusable AI frameworks, platforms, or internal
  tooling.
- Contributions to open-source projects, research papers, or
  technical blogs.

Regards

Rajan Paul(Linkedin Profile)

3Pillar Global
responsibilities: Build and deploy AI/ML models including ML, NLP, and deep learning solutions
Lead teams developing GenAI, LLM, Agentic AI, and MCP-driven applications
Design and implement RAG systems and vector embedding architectures
Perform data preparation, feature engineering, model training, and tuning
Build reusable AI frameworks, platforms, and internal tooling
Implement model monitoring and performance tracking systems
Collaborate with stakeholders to deliver ML solutions from concept to production
use_cases: Large Language Model applications with fine-tuning and API integration
Agentic AI and autonomous agent systems
ai_classification_reasoning:
This role requires hands-on experience building and
deploying AI/ML models, including LLMs, Agentic AI, RAG
systems, and MCP-based architectures. The position involves
direct work on model training, fine-tuning, and building
GenAI applications from concept to production.
